## :memo: Description
Please describe the changes you've made in detail. Explain what was changed, added, or removed.

## :mag: Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number)

## :bulb: Motivation and Context
Explain why this change is required and what problem it solves. If it fixes a bug or adds a feature, detail the reasoning here.

## :tv: Screenshots / Video (if applicable)
Please include screenshots or a short video showing the before/after or the new feature in action on the Android TV interface.

## :test_tube: How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Mention the Android version and whether you used a physical Android TV device or an emulator.

## :books: Documentation Updates
Does this PR introduce new features or change existing behavior that requires updates to the official user guide?
- [ ] No documentation changes required.
- [ ] Yes, the documentation at [quickbars.app/guide](https://quickbars.app/guide) needs to be updated.
